movies.name: Umbrellas
movies.description: A rain-soaked short about a father, a child, and one impossible umbrella that turns a dark forest into a moving painting.
movies.curatorNote: Best watched late at night with the sound low and the room almost still.

movies.name: The Paper House
movies.description: A gentle animated fable about a tiny home that folds itself into new shapes whenever the wind changes its mind.
movies.curatorNote: Soft, strange, and full of little frames that feel like diary pages.

movies.name: Moss Garden
movies.description: Two wandering spirits search for a lost bell through a green world of quiet ponds, sleeping roots, and painted shadows.
movies.curatorNote: The most meditative film in the shelf, built for slow eyes.

movies.name: Lantern Cart
movies.description: A travelling lantern seller brings light to a town where every window has forgotten how to glow.
movies.curatorNote: Warm amber scenes against deep blue-black nights.

movies.name: Cloud House
movies.description: An odd little cloud lands on a balcony and slowly teaches a lonely architect to draw without a ruler.
movies.curatorNote: A quiet pick for people who like small, tender stories.

movies.name: The Small Hour
movies.description: At 3 a.m., a child follows a silver moth into a city where shadows rehearse their dreams before sunrise.
movies.curatorNote: Dreamy, nocturnal, and slightly haunted in the prettiest way.

movies.name: Seeking Red
movies.description: A market day bursts into color when a young artist and a white monkey chase a trail of red pigment through the city.
movies.curatorNote: Brighter than the rest, but still textured like handmade paper.

movies.name: My Family and the Wolf
movies.description: A warm forest fantasy where a child meets a quiet orange wolf and learns that family can be both strange and protective.
movies.curatorNote: Bright, tender, and painted like sunlight caught between tree trunks.

movies.name: The Shadow in the Woods
movies.description: At the edge of a pale field, a child faces the dark shape that has been waiting between the trees.
movies.curatorNote: A beautiful little shiver for people who like their fairy tales with teeth.

movies.name: Lightfall
movies.description: A wanderer and a gentle guardian climb a living hill while blue birds scatter pieces of daylight ahead of them.
movies.curatorNote: A softer daylight counterpoint to the darker 24frames shelf.

movies.name: Pimo & Rex
movies.description: Two unlikely riders cross a coral-colored wilderness full of odd branches, mountain dust, and comic danger.
movies.curatorNote: Playful, graphic, and a little weird in the best handmade way.
